name: chamomilla recutita
title: chamomilla recutita benefits
description: Chamomilla recutita reduces inflammation, which is the body's natural response to injury or damage, characterized by redness, swelling, pain, and impaired function. This benefit is crucial as inflammation can lead to chronic conditions such as arthritis, cardiovascular disease, and even cancer, making it a vital aspect of overall health and well-being. The anti-inflammatory properties of Chamomilla recutita can be attributed to its bioactive constituents, including apigenin, luteolin, ...
